member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.GetInfo
member.summary: Provides basic information about the API and its configuration.

member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific pet record by its ID.

member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.Get
member.summary: Retrieves all pet records from the SQL database.

member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.Post(PetHealthAPI.Models.Pet)
member.summary: Adds a new pet record to the SQL database.

member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.Put(System.Int32,PetHealthAPI.Models.Pet)
member.summary: Updates an existing pet record in the SQL database.

member.name: M:PetHealthAPI.Controllers.PetsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a pet record from the SQL database.
